basic_details.job_title: District Judge Dhenkanal – Junior Typist, Stenographer and More – 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 for 20 posts of Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Gr-III and Salaried Amin. Candidates with any graduate, 12th Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 27-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Judge Dhenkanal official website dhenkanal.dcourts.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, H.S.C. examination or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training, Knowledge in Computer Application, Minimum speed of 40 wpm in typewriting on computer, Minimum speed of 80 wpm in shorthand and 40 wpm in typewriting on computer, Ability to speak, read and write Odia (M.E. Standard)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dhenkanal.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
